name: Cream Cheese Swirled Brownies
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 20 Minutes Bake Time: 35 Minutes
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease a 13 x 9-inch pan with Butter Flavor Crisco. Set aside.
2. For the filling, cream together the Butter Flavor Crisco, Cream cheese, and Vanilla in a small mixing bowl using an electric mixer on medium speed until well blended. Add 1/2 cup Sugar and beat in 2 Eggs one at a time until well incorporated. Beat in 3 tablespoons Flour. Set aside.
3. For the brownie base, melt Butter Flavor Crisco in a large saucepan over low heat. Add 4 Eggs one at a time, stirring quickly into the hot mixture after each addition. Stir in 1 tablespoon Vanilla.
4. In a separate bowl, combine 1 1/4 cups Flour, Baking powder, and Salt. Gradually stir this dry mixture into the chocolate mixture.
5. Pour half of the brownie batter into the prepared pan. Spread the remaining batter over the surface. Drop spoonfuls of the Cream Cheese mixture on top of the brownie layer, then spread gently to cover with more batter. Use a knife to swirl the two mixtures together (a gentle approach is key; avoid overworking).
6. Bake in the preheated oven for 35 minutes. Allow cooling completely before cutting into squares approximately 2 x 2 inches.
Makes: 2 dozen brownies
